expectations.text: Model uses materialized='incremental' with merge strategy
expectations.evidence: Config block specifies materialized='incremental' with incremental_strategy='merge'.

expectations.text: Unique key is defined for merge deduplication
expectations.evidence: unique_key=['order_id','line_item_id'] is set in the config.

expectations.text: Includes an is_incremental() guard for the WHERE clause
expectations.evidence: No {% if is_incremental() %} block found; full table scan on every run.

expectations.text: Output directory follows the intermediate layer convention
expectations.evidence: Model is placed in models/staging/ instead of models/intermediate/.
